states.name: Musashi
states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description:
That night, thousands of oni descended upon Musashi. Though her armor was torn apart and her blade chipped, she cut down hundreds of them. She fought until dawn, but at last her strength failed her. Bound in chains, a special potion was forced down her throat.
Her screams were swallowed by the darkness as her eyes slowly stained red.

states.name: Musashi
states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description: Musashi's sanity fiercely resisted the oni transformation. Yet at the same time, a part deep within her was quietly exulting. Pure strength was flooding through her body. Fear and pleasure clashed, her blood burned hot, and before she knew it, her mind focused. She clung only to the sensation of victory, losing what it meant to be human.

states.name: Musashi
states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description: Now she had obtained unparalleled power. The doubts that had weighed on her were gone. Yet in the depths of her heart, there was a faint voice desperately calling out—the voice of a girl calling to her.
